headline: Software-Centric Radar And Resilient Comms Push Could Be A Game Changer For RTX (RTX)
summary: Recently, RTX’s Raytheon business secured a new Office of Naval Research contract to advance software-defined naval radar, while its BBN Technologies division proved the PACE4ACE self-healing communications system can keep military data flowing securely even under jamming and network outages. Together, these projects underscore RTX’s push into software-centric defense capabilities that aim to upgrade existing platforms through code rather than costly new hardware. Next, we’ll explore how...

headline: Gina Rinehart Invests $97 Million in US Defense Stocks
summary: Australia's richest person expanded Hancock Prospecting's defense holdings while increasing exposure to global mining companies.
